Welcome to 17th Avenue Dental Choice

Creating Lifelong Healthy Beautiful Smiles

Book Now
Reserve Your Spot Now

Trusted, Compassionate,
Personalized Dental CareServing the 17th Ave Community

At 17th Avenue Dental Choice, quality care begins the moment you step into our practice. Located on vibrant 17th Avenue near Downtown Calgary, our modern and welcoming dental office is designed to ensure every patient feels comfortable, supported, and genuinely cared for. Our team delivers dentistry with intention, professionalism, and sincerity—helping each individual feel confident throughout their oral health journey.

You can find us at 1301 17 Ave SW, #110, Calgary, just off 14th St SW, with convenient rear parking and nearby public transit. If you are looking for a reliable dentist on 17th Avenue or close to Downtown Calgary, our central location and dedicated team make your visit both seamless and reassuring

Book now
Contact US

A Dental Team Dedicated to Your Oral Health
We Listen & Empower Our Patients

At 17th Avenue Dental Choice, we build lasting relationships rooted in trust, transparency, and genuine care. Our team is committed to educating patients, explaining each procedure clearly, and creating a welcoming atmosphere where every individual feels respected and valued.

With advanced technology and a patient-centered approach, we offer preventive, restorative, cosmetic, and emergency services tailored to your needs. Our philosophy is simple: empower patients, provide exceptional care, and support long-term oral health and well-being.

Book now
Contact US

Experience Patient-Focused Dentistry with a Modern Touch Discover The Dental Choice Difference

We are committed to providing clarity, comfort, and exceptional care. Our practice offers a comprehensive range of dental services in a calm, contemporary environment that welcomes patients of all ages. Every detail—from our technology to our service approach—is thoughtfully designed to offer a pleasant, personalized experience.

Comprehensive Services Under One Roof

Whether it's your routine checkup or a more advanced procedure, we do it all.

Experienced, Multilingual Dental Team

Our dentists and staff speak multiple languages. So, you can be confident there won't be any confusion about your needs.

Advanced Technology & Modern Techniques

We employ current tools and digital systems to deliver precise, effective, and minimally invasive care and treatment.

Patient-Focused Approach You Can Trust

Each treatment plan is carefully formulated with consideration for the individual's comfort, education, and personalized care plan.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you accept the Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP)?

Yes, we accept CDCP and will assist patients in understanding their coverage.

What financing or payment options do you have available?

We offer flexible financing and payment options to help with budgeting. We also accept major credit cards.

How do I book an appointment?

You can contact our clinic by phone or schedule an appointment at your convenience through our online booking system.

What types of dental services do you provide?

We offer a comprehensive range of dental services, including general, cosmetic, restorative, pediatric, and emergency care, suitable for all ages.

Are you accepting new patients, and do you provide emergency care?

Yes, we are accepting new patients and can provide same-day emergency appointments where possible.

Do you accept dental insurance, and will you bill directly?

Yes, we accept most insurance plans and offer simple direct billing.
